content.situation: 朋友说要提前离开聚会，你希望礼貌结束对话并保持联系
content.speakerText: I should get going—my roommate is expecting me back.
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，室友在等我回去。

blanks.answer: Let’s catch up over video call soon!
options: I hope you have a good trip!
Let’s catch up over video call soon!

content.hint: 用未来计划或轻松约定来自然收尾，避免冷场
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌结束对话并留出再会空间

content.situation: 同事在下班前说要赶公交，你想友好结束对话并暗示下次交流

blanks.answer: Let me know what you think of the new project tomorrow!
options: Go ahead! Let me know what you think of the new project tomorrow!

content.hint: 用一个小任务或后续话题自然延续联系，增强互动感
content.knowledgePoint: 通过轻松任务强化后续联系

content.situation: 邻居在门口打招呼后准备离开，你想礼貌道别并表达期待再见面
content.speakerText: Alright, I’ll head inside—it’s getting late.
content.speakerTextCn: 好吧，我进去了，天快晚了。

blanks.answer: See you around—let’s chat more next time we’re outside!
options: See you around—let’s chat more next time we’re outside!

content.hint: 用非正式但友好的方式表达期待下次见面，避免生硬结束
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌结束对话并留出再会空间
